input.title: Nike unveils limited colorway of existing sneaker line
input.content: Nike (NKE) released a new colorway of an existing lifestyle sneaker through its app. The drop is limited and follows a regular seasonal cadence. Management did not change guidance.

mockModelResponse.headline: Nike drops limited sneaker colorway
mockModelResponse.summary: Nike launched a limited colorway in an existing line without changing financial guidance. Impact looks routine.

meta.notes: Routine product noise should not alert.
